summary: Completed comprehensive testing of backend migration from Python/FastAPI to Node.js/Express. All existing features (Auth, Blogs CRUD, Services CRUD, Templates CRUD, Contact CRUD, Stats, Seed Data) successfully ported and working correctly. Frontend integration fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend health check: GET /api/health returns {status: 'healthy', service: 'APIXEL Agency API'}
Admin login: POST /api/auth/login with admin@agency.com / Admin@123 returns JWT token
Blogs: GET /api/blogs returns 3 blogs with correct fields (id, title, slug, content, etc.)
Services: GET /api/services returns 4 services sorted by order
Templates: GET /api/templates returns 6 templates with correct fields
Contact form submission: POST /api/contact works correctly
Protected routes require Bearer token (401 without token) - verified with /api/stats
Stats: GET /api/stats returns correct counts (3 blogs, 4 services, 6 templates, 7 messages)
Admin login from frontend works and redirects to /admin/dashboard
Store page loads with 6 template cards showing 'Visit Site' buttons
Home page services section loads with all 4 services displayed
Blog page loads with 3 articles correctly
Frontend navigation between all pages working correctly
No error messages found on any frontend pages
All backend API endpoints responding correctly (7/7 tests passed)
